title: Ornith-1.0: A family of open-source LLMs specialized for agentic coding
abstract: Ornith-1.0: A family of open-source LLMs specialized for agentic coding stands out in the LLM landscape with strong reasoning, long context windows, and tool-calling support. Developer adoption spe...
abstract_zh: 大模型圈子里卷成麻花了，但 Ornith-1.0: A family of open-source LLMs specialized for agentic coding 是真的有两把刷子。推理强、上下文长、还支持工具调用。开发者社区的人气说明了一切。
